title: Ukraine calls on Israel to detain Russian ship carrying stolen grain
detail: Ukraine has formally requested Israeli authorities to detain a Russian vessel suspected of carrying grain stolen from Ukrainian territories. The appeal represents Ukraine's ongoing efforts to prevent Russia from profiting from agricultural products illegally seized from occupied Ukrainian farmland. This diplomatic initiative highlights the international dimensions of Russia's economic exploitation of occupied territories and Ukraine's attempts to use international law enforcement to counter such activities.

media.caption: Ukraine requests Israel to detain Russian ship suspected of carrying stolen grain
